reviews.review_description: When is the 17+ rated M for mature that definitely what it means. No questions don’t be a bad parent like I did. My seven-year-old was begging for it. I got it for him and let me tell you every time he got off of it he had an attitude like there was no other and also he seemed like he was hurt by the things that were going on in that game. I have no idea what they were, but I’m getting rid of this game. ￼
I have played this demo dozens of times and i love it. I would buy the real game if i could see / play the variety of maps. It isn't very promising if you only play on one map.

developer_response.body: Sorry you had a bad experience! Please join the discord https://discord.com/invite/7kX77gScu4. I would love to sort out the issues you had. Keep in mind the game is a demo and very early development. Thanks for downloading and playing anyhow and hopefully I will fix these issues you encountered in the near future!

reviews.review_title: Really good game just needs work
reviews.review_description: This game is loads of fun just the enemies need work like in the demo house if a enemy spawns in the front bedroom on the second floor in the front of the house he will shoot you through the window well your still in the cut scene and the enemies will shoot you once and they'll kill you and it doesn't help when they can shoot you through windows when you don't even see them.I know most of what I said was negative but the game is still in beta and I see a lot of potential and I like the surrendering part of the game but maybe make hostages that you have to save by putting them in a van or something
